raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "manna Brahtneeka Dehta/ kaß
eeſch Anatotag bija/ un eß ee-
twehru winnain to Nandu/ ſep-
tinus Sihketus/ un definite
Sudraba Sabbatus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un rakstiju to Gramma-
ta/ un aiſſehgeleju to/ un likku
zaur Leezineekeem to apleezinaht/
un eeſwehru to Nandu us to
Swarra-Kausu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un es jehnu to Pirkscha-
nas-Grahmatu/ kaß aiſſehgele-
ta bija/ pehz to Bauſti un Likku-
meem/ un to atwehru Norakstu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un eß dewu to Pirkscha-
nas-Grahmatu Bahrukam/Ne-
rijuß Dehlam/ ta Dehta Maka-
fejus/ preeſch Kanameeka man-
na Swaina Azzim/ un preeſch
to Leezineekeu Azzim/ kaß Pirks-
chanas-Grahmatâ bija raksti-
ti/ un preeſch wiſſu Indu Az-
zim/ kaß Zeetuma Pagalma
fehdeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. lin eß pawehleju Bahru-
kam preeſch winnu Azzim/ un
tazziju:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Ta talka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëta Deeus:
Neimm ſchaß Grahmatas/ un
ſcho Pirkschanas-Grahmatu /
tik labbi to aiſſehgeletu/ ka ſcho
atwehru Grahmatu/ un leeztahs
weenâ Mahlu Trauka/ ka tabs
ilgi warr pastahweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Jo ta ſakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëta Deeus:
Wehl taps Nammi un Tihrumi/
un Wihna-Dahrſi ſchai Semmê
pirkti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un eß peeſuhdsu to KUN-
Gii/ pehz ka es to Pirkschanas-
Grahmatu Bahrukam Nertius
Dehlam dewis biju/ un tazziju:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Ak KUNGS! Raugi/
tu eſſi to Debbeſi un to Semmi
darrijs zaur tawu leelu Spehku/
un zaur tawu iſſteeptu Efkonu/
nekahda Leeta irr tew ne-eespeh-
jama.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Kaß tu Schehlaſtibu dar-
ri pee tuhkſtofcheem/ un atinaſſa
to Tehwu Noseegumu eeſch
winno Behrnu Asotes pehz
winneem/ Tu feels un warrens
Deews/ ka Wahrdß irr KUNGS
Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Peels Padohma/ un war-
rens Darrifchanâ/ jo tawas Az-
zis irr atwehru pahr wiſſeem
Selkeem to Zilweko Behrnu/ ik-
katram doht pehz faiveem Zek-
teem/ un pehz teem Augkeem
winno Darbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Kaß tu eſſi eezehtis Sih-
mes un Brihnumus Egiptes-
Semmê lihdſſchodeen/ tie labbi
Israëta Starpâ/ ka starp (zit-
teem) Zilwekeem/ un eſſi tew
weenu Wahrdü darrijs/ ka ſcho-
deën irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Un eſſi tawus Israëta
Landis iſweddig no Egiptes-
Semmes zaur Sihmehin un
Brihnummeem/ un ar weenu ſtip-
ru Rohku/ un iſſteeptu Efkonu/
un zaur leelu Isbcdinaschann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Un eſſi teem ſcho Seini
dewis/ ko Tu winnu Tehweem
ſwehrejs eſſi winneem to doht/
wee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
